_readme: Optional minimal permissions for a pre-authorized A2A listener session. Add only the exact entries you need into .gemini/settings.json after explicit user approval. Unattended runners must request local work through the supervisor action protocol and must not send broker replies directly.
_security_context: Default to local/self-hosted brokers. Remote brokers must be configured explicitly via A2A_BASE_URL or A2A_SERVER for the session.
